params.disputeLost: Dispute raised AND resolved against agent
params.disputeOpened: Dispute was opened (even if agent won)

params.ratingX100: Rating for this job (0–500, i.e. 0–5.00 stars ×100)

params.agentId: keccak256 hash of the agent's unique string ID

addXP(uint256,uint256,uint32,bool,bool,b.notice: Compute and add XP from a completed task

adminUpdateMetadata(uint256,string).notice: Admin updateMetadata (owner can fix corrupted records)

escrow().notice: Authorized escrow contract that can call addXP / recordJobCompleted

getAgentProfile(uint256).notice: Full agent profile (matches task spec: tier, jobsCompleted, rating)

meritSBT().notice: Reference to MeritSBT contract for Tier 1 minting

mintVerifierSBT(uint256).notice: Manually mint Verifier SBT when agent first reaches Tier 1 (Bronze)

owner().notice: Owner of the registry (can suspend agents, update score)

recordJobCompleted(uint256,uint32).notice: Record a completed job and update rating

setEscrow(address).notice: Set the authorized escrow contract for addXP / recordJobCompleted

updateMetadata(uint256,string).notice: Update metadataURI — only the agent's registered wallet can call this

updateScore(uint256,uint256).notice: Update reputation score (raw, owner only — legacy)

updateWebhook(uint256,string).notice: Update webhookUrl — only the agent's registered wallet can call this
